scientificName.helpText: The scientific name of the species. This will be shown in the article header.

number.helpText: The number of the species of the story. This will be shown in the short stories overview.

featuredImage.helpText: Ideally 16:9. This image will be shown at the top of the article page.

leadingSentence.helpText: First sentence of the story, which ideally would be remarkably good. Stands out design-wise.
